name: Reclaim Protocol
long_description:
Reclaim Protocol provides best in class conversion rates (45%+) on education, employment and retail loyalty verification. Global coverage and fully private.

- **Global coverage.** Unlike most other vendors we are global by default. No matter where in the world the user is, we can verify.
- **It is 100% private.** Neither you, nor us, see any private information about the user. So you carry no liabilities. No risk of your database getting hacked. 
- **Best in class conversion.** We have the highest conversion rates in the industry at 45%+ because users don't have to scramble for their documents to upload.
- **AI fraud resistant.** All the verifications happen securely using cryptography that even the most advanced models cannot fake.
one_liner: Education, Employment, Loyalty verification. Global & Compliant.
